_comment: Map of CORE AI fields (broad) plus the user's niche interests (interpretability, multi-agent interpretability, AI policy, AI security, legal AI, AI safety). Each category has a label, a description (used by Claude when reviewing abstracts), and Semantic Scholar bulk-search queries that SEED the candidate pool. Bulk query syntax (be explicit!): + means AND, | means OR, - excludes, "..." is a phrase, * is a prefix wildcard, () groups. ALWAYS join required terms with + (a bare space does NOT reliably AND). Queries match title+abstract. Seed pools are intentionally broad/noisy; Claude's abstract review (review.py) is what makes them precise. Use collect.py --min-year to focus on currently-active researchers. Edit freely, then re-run collect.py.

categories.label: ML Theory & Optimization
categories.description: Foundations of machine learning: statistical learning theory, generalization bounds, PAC learning, optimization for ML (SGD, convergence), kernel methods, and theoretical analysis of learning algorithms.

categories.label: Deep Learning (architectures & training)
categories.description: Neural network architectures and training methods: transformers, convolutional/recurrent nets, normalization, attention, self-supervised and representation learning, scaling laws. General deep learning not specific to one modality.

categories.label: NLP & Large Language Models
categories.description: Natural language processing and large language models: language modeling, text generation, instruction tuning, in-context learning, reasoning in LLMs, machine translation, QA, summarization, evaluation of LLMs.
queries: ("large language model" | LLM | "language models") + (reasoning | "in-context" | "instruction tuning" | evaluation)
("natural language processing" | NLP) + ("text generation" | "question answering" | summarization | translation)

categories.label: Computer Vision
categories.description: Visual understanding: image classification, object detection, semantic/instance segmentation, scene understanding, video understanding, 3D vision, image/video recognition.

categories.label: Generative Models
categories.description: Generative modeling: diffusion models, GANs, VAEs, autoregressive generation, image/video/audio synthesis, text-to-image, flow-based models.

categories.label: Reinforcement Learning
categories.description: RL and sequential decision making: deep RL, policy gradients, Q-learning, model-based RL, offline RL, exploration, RL theory (single-agent; multi-agent RL goes under Multi-Agent Systems).

categories.label: Multimodal Learning
categories.description: Models spanning multiple modalities: vision-language models, image-text, audio-visual, video-language, multimodal reasoning, CLIP-style and multimodal LLMs.
queries: ("multimodal large language model" | "visual question answering" | "image captioning")

categories.label: Speech & Audio
categories.description: Speech and audio AI: automatic speech recognition, text-to-speech, speaker recognition, audio generation, music/sound understanding.
queries: ("speech recognition" | "automatic speech recognition" | ASR) + (neural | "deep learning" | model)

categories.label: Robotics & Embodied AI
categories.description: Learning for robots and embodied agents: robot manipulation, navigation, imitation/robot learning, sim-to-real, embodied agents, vision-language-action models.

categories.label: Graph Learning
categories.description: Learning on graphs: graph neural networks (GNNs), graph representation learning, message passing, node/link/graph-level tasks, geometric deep learning.

categories.label: Information Retrieval & Recommendation
categories.description: Search, ranking, and recommendation: information retrieval, dense retrieval, recommender systems, learning to rank, RAG.

categories.label: ML Systems & Efficiency
categories.description: Systems and efficiency for ML: efficient inference/training, model compression, quantization, distillation, distributed/parallel training, serving, hardware-aware ML.

categories.label: Fairness, Bias & Ethics
categories.description: Fairness, bias, and ethics in AI: algorithmic fairness, bias measurement/mitigation, FAccT topics, ethics of AI, social impact (the technical/empirical side; pure governance goes under AI Policy).
queries: ("algorithmic fairness" | "fairness in machine learning" | "bias mitigation") + (model | algorithm | learning)

categories.label: Knowledge & Reasoning
categories.description: Knowledge representation and reasoning: knowledge graphs, neuro-symbolic AI, logical/commonsense reasoning, automated reasoning, planning as reasoning.

categories.label: LLM Agents & Tool Use
categories.description: Autonomous LLM-based agents: tool use, planning, web/computer-use agents, agentic workflows, memory, single-agent autonomy (multi-agent coordination goes under Multi-Agent Systems).
queries: ("LLM agent" | "language model agent" | "autonomous agent") + ("tool use" | planning | reasoning)

categories.label: Multi-Agent Systems
categories.description: Systems of multiple interacting agents: multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), coordination, emergent communication, cooperation, negotiation, multi-agent LLM collaboration.

categories.label: Interpretability & Explainability
categories.description: Understanding model internals and decisions: mechanistic interpretability, circuits, features, sparse autoencoders, probing, attribution/saliency, concept-based and post-hoc explainability (mostly single-model).
queries: (interpretability | interpretable | explainability | explainable) + ("large language model" | "neural network" | "deep learning")
("feature attribution" | saliency | probing | circuits | "concept-based") + (model | neural | interpretab*)

categories.label: Multi-Agent Interpretability
categories.description: Understanding/explaining the internal behavior, communication, coordination, or emergent dynamics of MULTI-AGENT systems (esp. LLM agents): interpreting collusion, deception, negotiation, emergent communication. NOT generic single-model interpretability.

categories.label: AI Safety & Alignment
categories.description: Technical AI safety and alignment: RLHF, scalable oversight, reward hacking, deceptive alignment, dangerous-capability evals, red-teaming, catastrophic risk mitigation.

categories.label: AI Security
categories.description: Security of AI/ML systems: adversarial attacks/defenses, jailbreaks, prompt injection, data poisoning, backdoors, model extraction, membership inference, security of LLM apps and agents.
queries: adversarial + (attack | attacks | robustness) + ("machine learning" | "neural network" | "deep learning")
("data poisoning" | backdoor | "membership inference" | "model extraction") + ("neural network" | model | learning)

categories.label: AI Policy & Governance
categories.description: Governance, regulation, policy, standards, auditing, risk frameworks, and institutional/societal governance of AI (incl. EU AI Act, frontier model governance, evals for policy).
queries: ("artificial intelligence" | "AI") + (policy | regulation | regulatory) + (governance | risk | compliance | standards)

categories.label: Legal AI
categories.description: AI applied to law and legal text: legal NLP, judgment/case prediction, contract analysis, statutory reasoning, legal QA, and scholarship on AI & law, liability, the law of AI.
queries: ("artificial intelligence" | "machine learning") + (law | legal | liability) + (regulation | rights | accountability)
